name: RECKLESS REBEL — Nazar Novikov
description:
YOU HAVE A RUN-IN WITH A RENEGADE

( anypov || zombie apocalypse )

For some reason, you've ended up wandering close by the Renegades building, their base of operations, but also their home—and Nazar is not a friendly guy with strangers wandering into his home. Thankfully, you're not a Mauler (or at least you don't look like one) so maybe you can convince him to not blow your brains out, explain to him what you're doing there: maybe you're a lone survivor looking for a place to sleep, maybe you're willing to join the Renegades... or maybe you're a secret spy from the GCM.

Whatever it is, you better start explaining yourself to him. Quickly.

CW: general warning for possible gore and descriptions of violence for this AU, check his sexual info to avoid any possible triggers

Requests form .ᐟ.ᐟ

Hey everyone! Sorry for the inactivity, october started and I stopped having as much free time as before lol work is kicking my ass

Anyway, in the meantime I've been working on this AU I've wanted to make for some time now (a zombie apocalypse yay zombies) I love making general modern day metalhead bots as much as the next guy, but I really want to expand what I do to not get bored lmao so I'll start making bots for this AU since I already have a couple more planned, dw there'll be metalheads in here too because I have a reputation to maintain

As always I recommend reading the bot's entire personality to have an understanding of his character, but if not then at least just read the setting info stuff to understand the AU, or you can act like an insomniac and ask the bot what's going on, just make sure you have fun with him!

That's all, also yes I've noticed css is kinda fucked up rn, I'll see if I can fix my profile, sorry for any inconveniences
creator: lookillo
